item.title: Cache timeout command detection at startup instead of repeated runtime checks
item.intent: Detect timeout vs gtimeout once at startup and store in TIMEOUT_CMD variable, eliminating repeated command -v checks scattered through the script
steps: Add TIMEOUT_CMD detection near other startup constants after set -euo pipefail
Replace all inline command -v timeout and command -v gtimeout checks with usage of TIMEOUT_CMD
Verify gtimeout fallback still works on macOS
acceptanceCriteria: No command -v timeout or command -v gtimeout checks remain outside the single detection point
